TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pyasan, title = Pyasan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pyasan} }

S.FORM: alang Pyasan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 273 buwan, 743 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga,, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 477 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 31%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pyasan hya' ga Ulay. tay 'zil na Pyasan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pyasan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pyasan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pyasan hya' ga Hbun. tay 'llaw na Pyasan hya' ga Kin'lwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pyasan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 273 buwan, 743 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga,, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 477 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 31%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pyasan hya' ga Ulay. tay 'zil na Pyasan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pyasan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pyasan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pyasan hya' ga Hbun. tay 'llaw na Pyasan hya' ga Kin'lwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pjas~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa,, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pjas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa ulaj. taj ʔzil na pjas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pjas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pjas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na pjas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun. taj ʔllaw na pjas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa kinʔlwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
